notes: REVERTED to 1.0.0: the v1.0.1 OTA crash-looped on the device (PANIC during the HTTPS download, silent reboot, never completed) -> device stuck re-trying. Holding the channel at 1.0.0 (== running FW_VERSION) so devices stop attempting the update and stay on the stable build. Re-release as 1.0.2 once the OTA download crash is fixed.
